name: @convariance/gateway
description: The convariance local gateway: one Node process bridging an MCP agent (Claude Code over stdio) and a live web session (HTTP + SSE), sharing one in-memory BridgeSession. Direct-drain mode out of the box — no API key required; plug a Classifier in for the reflex-style front door.

scripts.prepack: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) throw new Error('publish with pnpm (pnpm publish:all) — npm publish does not apply publishConfig.exports or rewrite workspace:^ deps')"
